title: Fix PODES export: cross-survey leakage + N-to-1 row merge + sheet name truncation
description:
PODES2024-DESA-FF.xlsx export shows wrong data — 6 rows instead of expected respondent count, and 5 of 6 rows are cross-survey leakage (gc_sbr2023 enterprise records bleeding into PODES sheet).

## Root causes (lib/app/data/services/fasih_backup_reader.dart)

1. **Weak templateId filter** (_parseDataFile, line ~167):
   `if (fileTemplateId != null && fileTemplateId != templateId) return null;`
   Only rejects when file *declares* a non-matching templateId. Files missing the field slip through regardless of which survey they belong to.

2. **N-to-1 row collapse** (loadRecords, line ~124):
   `final mergedValues = <String, String>{};` + `mergedValues.addAll(parsed.values)` per respUuid → ALL data.json files under one respondent's answers/ dir get merged into a single record. Answer-key collisions across surveys make the data look correct in shared columns but bleed into wrong columns elsewhere.

3. **No sheet name truncation** (fasih_backup_writer.dart line 92):
   `sheet.name = template.dataKey` — Excel rejects sheet names >31 chars. Old HomeCubit.exportToExcel (commit 8fe0d61) truncated to 31. Restore.

## Data evidence

Backup (~/Downloads/FASIH_BPS_Sukma Nirmala Dewi S.Tr.Stat._06_09_25__17_01):
- 400 total data.json across 10 survey templateDataKeys
- 0 PODES2024-DESA-FF records
- 6 STKU-H 2024 records (likely the 6 phantom PODES rows)
- 317 gc_sbr2023 records (source of cross-survey leakage)

Xlsx (~/Downloads/PODES2024-DESA-FF.xlsx):
- Row 1: PODES header (492 cols, correct)
- Rows 2-6: 9/492 non-empty cells each, content is gc_sbr2023 (enterprise IDs, company names)
- Row 7: 352/492 cells filled, actual PODES-shaped row
- _fasih_meta sheet: 249 respondent rows (vs 6 data rows — confirms N-to-1 collapse)

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] _parseDataFile rejects data.json when templateId field missing/null (fail-safe: only accept exact match)
- [ ] loadRecords emits ONE record per accepted data.json (not per respondent UUID)
- [ ] respondent meta count = data row count
- [ ] FasihBackupWriter truncates sheet name to 31 chars
- [ ] Regression test using a synthetic backup with mixed surveys, asserts only PODES rows appear in PODES export
- [ ] Re-export the user's backup → expect 6 STKU-H rows in STKU-H sheet, 0 in PODES sheet (or PODES export simply empty)

## Out of scope

- Re-add gc_sbr2023 records back into their own sheets via templateDataKey detection (separate enhancement)
- UI to pick template from discovered list (existing UI already shows templates)

title: Rename release APK + install flutter_launcher_icons
description:
Two related polish items for the release pipeline:

1. **APK naming**: Currently uploads `app-release.apk` (Flutter default). Change to `{AppName}-v{version}-{flavor}.apk` format.
   - AppName: PascalCase of pubspec name = `JsonConverter` (note: pubspec still has legacy name `json_converter`; android:label is "Fasih Converter")
   - version: from pubspec.yaml (currently 1.0.8)
   - flavor: build mode (debug/release) — fasih-converter has no flavor concept; use the Flutter build mode here

2. **App icon**: install `flutter_launcher_icons` and configure with `assets/launchers/icon.png` (currently 77×96, below 1024×1024 recommended).

## Steps
1. Branch off feature/bloc-autoroute-migration
2. Add flutter_launcher_icons to dev_dependencies
3. Add flutter_launcher_icons: config block to pubspec.yaml
4. Run dart run flutter_launcher_icons + commit generated icon files
5. Update .github/workflows/release.yml: parse version from pubspec, rename APK before upload
6. Verify locally
7. PR to feature/bloc-autoroute-migration

## Future cleanup (out of scope)
- Rename pubspec from `json_converter` to `fasih_converter` so APK becomes `FasihConverter-v...apk`
- Source icon.png is 77×96 — replace with 1024×1024 PNG for proper launcher quality

title: chore: cleanup, compile check, README + release
description:
Final cleanup tasks before release.

## Tasks
- Remove assets/credentials/ from pubspec (no longer bundled)
- flutter analyze clean pass
- flutter test all passing
- dart format lib/ test/

Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-22-dynamic-template-flutter3.md — Tasks 8–10

title: feat: rewrite HomeController + HomeView with dynamic template pipeline
description:
Replace Regsosek-specific controller/view with generic template-driven UI.

## HomeController Changes
- Remove artList, rutaList, ddList
- Add discoveredTemplates, selectedTemplate, records
- pickAndLoadBackup(): extracts zip, discovers templates, shows picker if multiple
- exportToExcel(): dynamic columns from template.fields
- uploadToSheets(): dynamic columns, sheet tab = template.dataKey
- shareExcel(): share saved .xlsx file

## HomeView Changes
- Drop zone → picks backup zip
- Survey picker bottom sheet (when multiple templates found)
- Action row: Share, Clear, Export Excel, Upload Sheets
- Dynamic DataTable2 with columns from selected template
- Settings icon in AppBar → navigate to /settings

Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-22-dynamic-template-flutter3.md — Tasks 6–7

title: feat: FasihBackupReader service — template discovery + answer extraction
description:
Service that reads a FASIH backup ZIP, discovers survey templates, and extracts respondent answers mapped to template fields.

## New Files
- lib/app/data/services/fasih_backup_reader.dart

## Responsibilities
- extractZip(File): extracts to app documents dir, returns Directory
- discoverTemplates(Directory): scans Template/ subfolder, returns List<FasihTemplate>
- loadRecords(Directory, FasihTemplate): walks UUID respondent folders, finds data.json files matching templateId, returns List<FasihRecord>

## Skip dirs: Template, env, lookup, formengine, backup

Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-22-dynamic-template-flutter3.md — Task 5

title: feat: settings repository + screen for Google Sheets credentials
description:
User-managed service account JSON credentials stored in SharedPreferences. Settings screen with file picker for JSON import + spreadsheet ID/URL field.

## New Files
- lib/app/data/repositories/settings_repository.dart: SharedPreferences wrapper, validates service_account JSON, extracts sheet ID from URL
- lib/app/modules/settings/: controller, view, binding, route

## Key Behaviors
- Validate JSON has type=service_account, client_email, private_key
- Parse spreadsheet ID from full Google Sheets URL
- Sheet tab name auto-generated from survey dataKey (no user input needed)

## Tests
- test/repositories/settings_repository_test.dart

Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-22-dynamic-template-flutter3.md — Tasks 3–4

title: feat: domain models — FasihTemplate, FasihTemplateField, FasihRecord
description:
Replace hardcoded ARTFields/RutaFields/DDFields with generic models that parse any FASIH survey template JSON.

## New Files
- lib/app/data/models/fasih_template.dart: parses template JSON, flattens component tree, strips HTML labels
- lib/app/data/models/fasih_record.dart: holds answer map, normalizes answer formats ([value] label)

## Deleted Files
- lib/app/data/models/art_fields.dart
- lib/app/data/models/art_data_source.dart
- lib/app/data/models/ruta_fields.dart
- lib/app/data/models/ruta_data_source.dart
- lib/app/data/models/dd_fields.dart

## Tests
- test/models/fasih_template_test.dart

Plan: docs/plans/2026-05-22-dynamic-template-flutter3.md — Task 2

title: chore: flutter 3 / dart 3 upgrade + package cleanup
description:
Upgrade SDK constraint to >=3.0.0 <4.0.0, remove flutter_config, update all packages to latest, fix deprecated APIs.

## Changes
- pubspec.yaml: bump sdk, update all deps, remove flutter_config/async_zip/url
- android/AndroidManifest.xml: add Android 13+ media permissions
- lib/app/data/core/utils/helpers.dart: fix deprecated Permission API

## Deprecated API Fixes
- Share.shareFiles → Share.shareXFiles
- MaterialStateProperty → WidgetStateProperty
- flutter_config FlutterConfig.get → SharedPreferences
